requirement_topic.en: KS C / IEC Product Standards for PV Inverter Safety and Performance
requirement_topic.zh: KS C / IEC 光伏逆变器安全与性能产品标准
requirement_topic.zht: KS C / IEC 光伏逆變器安全與性能產品標準

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers may hold IEC 62109 CB Scheme reports, GB/T 37408-2019 test reports, or voluntary CQC/CGC certificates. These can support technical review but do not automatically establish conformity to the Korean KS C edition, national deviations, Korean markings, or KC administrative requirements.
summary.zh: 中国制造商可能持有 IEC 62109 CB 体系报告、GB/T 37408-2019 测试报告或 CQC/CGC 自愿证书。这些资料可支持技术审查，但不会自动证明符合韩国 KS C 版本、国家差异、韩文标识或 KC 行政要求。
summary.zht: 中國製造商可能持有 IEC 62109 CB 體系報告、GB/T 37408-2019 測試報告或 CQC/CGC 自願證書。這些資料可支持技術審查，但不會自動證明符合韓國 KS C 版本、國家差異、韓文標識或 KC 行政要求。

gap.en: The practical gap is edition mapping and national-deviation review. Exporters should prepare a standards crosswalk from IEC/GB clauses to the applicable KS C clauses and identify any Korean deviations, labeling instructions, and factory-inspection requirements imposed by the KC certification body.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于版本映射和国家差异审查。出口商应准备 IEC/GB 条款与适用 KS C 条款的对照表，并识别 KC 认证机构要求的韩国差异、标签说明及工厂检查要求。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於版本映射和國家差異審查。出口商應準備 IEC/GB 條款與適用 KS C 條款的對照表，並識別 KC 認證機構要求的韓國差異、標籤說明及工廠檢查要求。

mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary unless required by project owner, buyer, or grid-connection contract.
mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where incorporated into KC certification criteria for the regulated product scope.

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC or GB evidence should be treated as supporting evidence only until mapped to the applicable KS C/KC certification criteria.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 或 GB 证据在映射至适用 KS C/KC 认证准则前，只应视为支持性资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 或 GB 證據在映射至適用 KS C/KC 認證準則前，只應視為支持性資料。

summary.en: Korean KC safety assessment commonly relies on Korean Standards in the KS C electrical series, including Korean adoptions of IEC inverter safety and PV power-converter standards such as IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2, plus inverter performance and grid-support requirements referenced by Korean certification bodies. The exact KS C edition and test scope must be confirmed against the KC application category and the certification body's current rules.
summary.zh: 韩国 KC 安全评估通常依据 KS C 电气系列韩国标准，包括 IEC 62109-1、IEC 62109-2 等逆变器安全和光伏功率变换器标准的韩国采标版本，以及韩国认证机构引用的逆变器性能和电网支撑要求。具体 KS C 版本和测试范围须按 KC 申请类别及认证机构现行规则确认。
summary.zht: 韓國 KC 安全評估通常依據 KS C 電氣系列韓國標準，包括 IEC 62109-1、IEC 62109-2 等逆變器安全和光伏功率變換器標準的韓國採標版本，以及韓國認證機構引用的逆變器性能和電網支撐要求。具體 KS C 版本和測試範圍須按 KC 申請類別及認證機構現行規則確認。

standards_or_laws: KATS Korean Standards (KS) catalogue and KC certification criteria
